description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test_release that runs on pull requests to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow checks if the PR is against main and not based on dev, then runs tests using a reusable workflow test_runner.yml. If tests pass, it reads the new version from .github/config_new_release.yml, compares it to the current version in setup.py, and warns or exits if not incremented. Otherwise, it creates a release candidate version, updates setup.py and pyproject.toml, sets up Python 3.10, installs dependencies, builds and uploads the package to TestPyPI, installs it, and runs tests with pytest.
